reviews.comment:
MUY LAMENTABLE. Mi hijo Argentino, residente en Florianopolis en Tránsito a visitar la familia con su esposa y su hijo de 2 años, no le quisieron cargar combustible por tener patente Brasilera. Aún  con tanque en reserva y pidiendo unos pocos litros para llegar al Dorado no lo quisieron hacer. Leyes del Estado ... Por favor ... LEYES PAUPÉRRIMAS

(Translated by Google)
VERY REGRETTABLE. My Argentinian son, a resident of Florianopolis, was in transit to visit family with his wife and 2-year-old son when they were refused fuel because his car had Brazilian license plates. Even with the tank on reserve and asking for just a few liters to reach Dorado, they refused. State laws... Please... OUTRAGEOUS LAWS
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNnVyYy1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pesima atención, empiezan a cargar a la 7 am.. Cargue 5625 pesos y porque quisieron me cobraron 5700 con debito. No quise  discutir porque sinceramente iba a ser una perdida de tiempo por 75 pesos, pero molesta mucho la actitud de la persona que me atendió.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They start processing payments at 7 am. I loaded 5625 pesos, and they charged me 5700 pesos on my debit card just because they felt like it. I didn't want to argue because, honestly, it would have been a waste of time for 75 pesos, but the attitude of the person who helped me was very annoying.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCM01ua3BRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca tienen sistema para cargar puntos ni para pagar con la aplicación. No respetan la cola. Solo atienden 1 solo anden siendo.que hay más

(Translated by Google)
They never have a system for adding points or paying with the app. They don't respect the queue. They only serve one person at a time, even though there are others.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdVBXYkRBEAE
